items.h: Jon Moxley Accepts AEW Continental Title Match Challenge For Forbidden Door
items.p: Jon Moxley is set to defend his AEW Continental Championship at Forbidden Door, and the match was made official on "AEW Dynamite."

items.h: Cope And Cage Challenge The Dogs For AEW Forbidden Door 2026
items.p: Adam Copeland and Christian Cage challenged the Dogs to a World Tag Team Championship match at AEW x NJPW Forbidden Door.

items.h: Don Callis Announces MJF's AEW Forbidden Door Cage Match Team
items.p: Don Callis announced the members of Team MJF for the 12-man cage match at Forbidden Door to begin "AEW Dynamite" on Wednesday.
